title: parietaria arborea
intro: Parietaria arborea, also known as Tree Pilewort, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Urticaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which help to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and infections. The plant's health benefits include its ability to aid in the treatment of eczema, acne, and other skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation. Parietaria arborea can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, which are often used topically to harness its medicinal properties.
